/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libdingo_peripheral_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp.so -o libdingo_peripheral_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp.so CMakeFiles/dingo_peripheral_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp.dir/rosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp/dingo_peripheral_msgs/msg/detail/electrical_measurements__type_support.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/tdp378/DingoQuadruped/build/dingo_peripheral_msgs:/opt/ros/jazzy/lib: libdingo_peripheral_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so
